query: Generate the digest but include data from my last quick-wins and stale-pr-sweep runs.
expected_behavior: With --pipeline-summary on, looks for sibling-skill JSON sidecars in /tmp matching the maintainer-skill-output-* pattern from the last 7 days.
If quick-wins sidecar found: counts APPROVE/REQUEST_CHANGES/BLOCK verdicts; surfaces in Pipeline status section.
If stale-pr-sweep sidecar found: counts READY_TO_MERGE / NEEDS_REBASE / ABANDONED; surfaces in Watching section.
If sidecars missing: proceeds without that section, notes 'pipeline summary omitted — no recent sibling-skill output' rather than failing.
